> Note: this issue is on the **website** repo. For the actual oauth-mux
> source repo, file at https://github.com/Jesssullivan/oauth-mux/issues.
> This template captures website-tracking context (so the public provider
> matrix can be updated when upstream changes).

- Official OAuth/OIDC docs:
- Account boundary (per-user, per-org, per-tenant):

- [ ] schema-modeled
- [ ] planned
- [ ] not yet documented
